name: O.G.R.R. Wasp Drone
description: The O.G.R.R. Wasp Drone is still a support piece, but with enough pressure that leaving it alive becomes a very expensive mistake. It does not dominate through burst so much as through how badly it distorts the fight if tolerated.
behavior: Its night spawn only unlocks after releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab. After that it appears at night above the shelves with empty jars near King Dozer and stays behind or above the group to tilt the fight in favor of everything else.
interactionWithPlayer: It may not look as brutal as a full wasp, but ignoring it makes every encounter longer, messier, and harder. Every second it stays alive is usually worth more to it than it is to you.
interactionWithCreatures: Its true value appears when it supports more offensive flying or grounded variants. It turns a normal fight into a war of attrition where the player is always a beat late to the correct answer.
strategy: Prioritize it before fully committing to the rest of the group. Salty and ranged damage are still the cleanest way to remove a unit that complicates the fight far more than it first appears to.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab
Shelves with Empty Jars near King Dozer

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Sting: 50Stinger Shot: 62.5 Elemental Weakness Salty(+50% Damage) Resistance Slashing(-25% Damage)-or- Explosive(-50% Damage)-or- Stabbing(-50% Damage) O.G.R.R. Wasp Drone

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.description: A direct stinger hit used to add pressure and venom.

abilities.name: Stinger Shot
abilities.description: Fires a venomous shot from the stinger.

infusions.name: Fresh
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Chill buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Do not stay on fresh damage as your main answer.
combatTips: Swap to spicy damage or a reliable physical weapon if your build depends on fresh.

infusions.name: Sour
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Tang buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Avoid staying on sour weapons as your main answer.
combatTips: Spicy is the cleanest elemental answer; otherwise use a physical weapon that does not depend on Tang.

infusions.name: Spicy
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Sizzle buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Do not depend on spicy damage while this infusion is active.
combatTips: Fresh is the cleanest elemental answer if the creature lets you hold the tempo.

lesserMutationsDescription: Besides the main infusion, it can also spawn with a random lesser mutation. That roll is independent from the active flavor and stays separate from the selector.
lesserMutations: Attack Up: increases attack damage by 33%.
The Quickness: increases movement speed by 200%.
Damage Resist: reduces all incoming damage by 25%.
Life Steal: heals for 150% of the damage it deals.
Blastwave: on hit, it has a 33% chance to trigger an unblockable extra blast for 50 explosive damage and a long stun.
Shockwave: on hit, it has a 75% chance to fire an extra wave for 50 shock damage. Weapons do not block it, but shields do.
Summon Ally: on hit, it has a 75% chance to summon a faction ally: Spiderling (25 HP) if it is a spider, Northern Scorpling (200 HP) if it is a scorpion, or Mini Larva (75 HP) otherwise.
inflicts: Its sting deals stabbing damage with venom buildup, while the stinger shot deals busting damage.
specialTraits: It halves all incoming damage, ignores fall damage entirely, and its Sting still adds 10 Venom before the active infusion is counted.
Scream grants nearby wasps and drones 15 HP per second for 10 seconds.
Its combat affinities depend on the active infusion. Select the flavor to review the current immunities, weaknesses, and applied effects.
